tZh: 零样本文本到图像生成
sEn: A simple transformer-based approach for zero-shot text-to-image generation achieves competitive results with domain-specific models when scaled with sufficient data.
sZh: 一种基于transformer的简单方法，通过将文本和图像令牌作为单一数据流进行自回归建模，在零样本评估中与领域特定模型竞争，且仅需足够的数据和规模。
absEn: Text-to-image generation has traditionally focused on finding better modeling assumptions for training on a fixed dataset. These assumptions might involve complex architectures, auxiliary losses, or side information such as object part labels or segmentation masks supplied during training. We describe a simple approach for this task based on a transformer that autoregressively models the text and image tokens as a single stream of data. With sufficient data and scale, our approach is competitive with previous domain-specific models when evaluated in a zero-shot fashion.
absZh: 文本到图像生成传统上专注于在固定数据集上寻找更好的建模假设。这些假设可能涉及复杂的架构、辅助损失或训练期间提供的对象部件标签或分割掩码等辅助信息。我们描述了一种基于transformer的简单方法，该方法将文本和图像令牌作为单一数据流进行自回归建模。在足够的数据和规模下，我们的方法在零样本评估中与之前的领域特定模型具有竞争力。

contrib.en: Proposes a simple transformer-based approach for zero-shot text-to-image generation by modeling text and image tokens as a single data stream.
contrib.zh: 提出一种基于Transformer的简单方法，通过将文本和图像令牌建模为单一数据流，实现零样本文本到图像生成。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that scaling data and model size (12-billion parameters) yields high-fidelity, flexible image generation competitive with domain-specific models.
contrib.zh: 证明扩展数据规模和模型规模（120亿参数）可生成高保真、灵活的图像，与领域特定模型竞争。

contrib.en: Introduces a two-stage training procedure with a discrete VAE for image compression and an autoregressive transformer for joint text-image modeling.
contrib.zh: 引入两阶段训练流程：离散VAE用于图像压缩，自回归Transformer用于联合文本-图像建模。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance on MS-COCO, preferred by human evaluators 90% of the time over prior work.
contrib.zh: 在MS-COCO上实现最先进的零样本性能，人类评估者90%的情况下偏好本方法。

contrib.en: Shows emergent capabilities like zero-shot image-to-image translation and combinatorial generalization from a single generative model.
contrib.zh: 展示单一生成模型涌现的零样本图像到图像翻译和组合泛化等能力。

contrib.en: Develops practical techniques for stable training of large-scale transformers, including per-resblock gradient scaling and PowerSGD compression.
contrib.zh: 开发大规模Transformer稳定训练的实用技术，包括逐残差块梯度缩放和PowerSGD压缩。

limits.en: Heavy image compression via dVAE limits high-frequency detail generation, reducing FID/IS on specialized datasets like CUB.
limits.zh: 通过dVAE的强图像压缩限制了高频细节生成，在CUB等专业数据集上降低FID/IS。

limits.en: Zero-shot performance on specialized distributions (e.g., CUB birds) is significantly worse than domain-specific models.
limits.zh: 在专业分布（如CUB鸟类）上的零样本性能显著差于领域特定模型。

limits.en: Model requires massive computational resources (12-billion parameters, 250M image-text pairs), limiting reproducibility.
limits.zh: 模型需要巨大计算资源（120亿参数、2.5亿图像-文本对），限制可复现性。

limits.en: Inconsistent performance on complex compositional tasks like variable binding (e.g., hedgehog in sweater walking dog).
limits.zh: 在复杂组合任务（如变量绑定）上表现不一致。

limits.en: Training instability in 16-bit precision required custom gradient scaling and parameter sharding to avoid underflow.
limits.zh: 16位精度训练不稳定，需要自定义梯度缩放和参数分片以避免下溢。

items.en: Text-to-image generation has traditionally focused on finding better modeling assumptions for training on a fixed dataset. These assumptions might involve complex architectures, auxiliary losses, or side information such as object part labels or segmentation masks supplied during training. We describe a simple approach for this task based on a transformer that autoregressively models the text and image tokens as a single stream of data. With sufficient data and scale, our approach is competitive with previous domain-specific models when evaluated in a zero-shot fashion.
items.zh: 文本到图像生成传统上专注于在固定数据集上训练时寻找更好的建模假设。这些假设可能涉及复杂的架构、辅助损失或训练期间提供的侧信息，如对象部件标签或分割掩码。我们描述了一种基于Transformer的简单方法，该方法将文本和图像令牌自回归地建模为单一数据流。在足够的数据和规模下，我们的方法在零样本评估时与之前的领域特定模型具有竞争力。

items.en: Modern machine learning approaches to text to image synthesis started with the work of Mansimov et al. (2015), who showed that the DRAW Gregor et al. (2015) generative model, when extended to condition on image captions, could also generate novel visual scenes. Reed et al. (2016b) later demonstrated that using a generative adversarial network (Goodfellow et al., 2014), rather than a recurrent variational auto-encoder, improved image fidelity. Reed et al. (2016b) showed that this system could not only generate objects with recognizable properties, but also could zero-shot generalize to held-out categories.
items.zh: 现代机器学习方法用于文本到图像合成始于Mansimov等人（2015）的工作，他们表明，当扩展为以图像标题为条件时，DRAW（Gregor等人，2015）生成模型也能生成新颖的视觉场景。Reed等人（2016b）后来证明，使用生成对抗网络（Goodfellow等人，2014）而不是循环变分自编码器可以提高图像保真度。Reed等人（2016b）表明，该系统不仅能生成具有可识别属性的对象，还能零样本泛化到未见过的类别。

items.en: Over the next few years, progress continued using a combination of methods. These include improving the generative model architecture with modifications like multi-scale generators (Zhang et al., 2017, 2018), integrating attention and auxiliary losses (Xu et al., 2018), and leveraging additional sources of conditioning information beyond just text (Reed et al., 2016a; Li et al., 2019; Koh et al., 2021).
items.zh: 在接下来的几年里，通过结合多种方法取得了进展。这些方法包括通过多尺度生成器（Zhang等人，2017, 2018）等修改改进生成模型架构，整合注意力机制和辅助损失（Xu等人，2018），以及利用除文本之外的额外条件信息源（Reed等人，2016a；Li等人，2019；Koh等人，2021）。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Comparison of original images (top) and reconstructions from the discrete VAE (bottom). The encoder downsamples the spatial resolution by a factor of 8. While details (e.g., the texture of the cat’s fur, the writing on the storefront, and the thin lines in the illustration) are sometimes lost or distorted, the main features of the image are still typically recognizable. We use a large vocabulary size of 8192 to mitigate the loss of information.
items.capZh: 图1：原始图像（上）与离散VAE重建图像（下）的比较。编码器将空间分辨率下采样8倍。虽然细节（例如猫毛的纹理、店面上的文字以及插图中的细线）有时会丢失或失真，但图像的主要特征通常仍然可识别。我们使用8192的大词汇量来减少信息损失。

items.en: Separately, Nguyen et al. (2017) propose an energy-based framework for conditional image generation that obtained a large improvement in sample quality relative to contemporary methods. Their approach can incorporate pretrained discriminative models, and they show that it is capable of performing text-to-image generation when applied to a captioning model pretrained on MS-COCO. More recently, Cho et al. (2020) also propose a method that involves optimizing the input to a pretrained cross-modal masked language model. While significant increases in visual fidelity have occurred as a result of the work since Mansimov et al. (2015), samples can still suffer from severe artifacts such as object distortion, illogical object placement, or unnatural blending of foreground and background elements.
items.zh: 另外，Nguyen等人（2017）提出了一种基于能量的条件图像生成框架，与同期方法相比，样本质量有了很大提升。他们的方法可以整合预训练的判别模型，并且他们表明，当应用于在MS-COCO上预训练的标题模型时，该方法能够执行文本到图像生成。最近，Cho等人（2020）也提出了一种方法，涉及优化预训练跨模态掩码语言模型的输入。尽管自Mansimov等人（2015）以来的工作带来了视觉保真度的显著提升，但样本仍然可能受到严重伪影的影响，例如对象扭曲、不合逻辑的对象放置或前景与背景元素的非自然混合。

items.en: Recent advances fueled by large-scale generative models suggest a possible route for further improvements. Specifically, when compute, model size, and data are scaled carefully, autoregressive transformers (Vaswani et al., 2017) have achieved impressive results in several domains such as text (Radford et al., 2019), images (Chen et al., 2020), and audio (Dhariwal et al., 2020).
items.zh: 最近由大规模生成模型推动的进展表明了一条进一步改进的可能途径。具体来说，当算力、模型大小和数据被仔细缩放时，自回归Transformer（Vaswani等人，2017）在文本（Radford等人，2019）、图像（Chen等人，2020）和音频（Dhariwal等人，2020）等多个领域取得了令人印象深刻的结果。

items.capEn: (a) a tapir made of accordion. a tapir with the texture of an accordion.
items.capZh: (a) 一个由手风琴组成的貘。一个具有手风琴纹理的貘。

items.capEn: (b) an illustration of a baby hedgehog in a christmas sweater walking a dog
items.capZh: (b) 一只穿着圣诞毛衣的婴儿刺猬遛狗的插图

items.capEn: (c) a neon sign that reads “backprop”. a neon sign that reads “backprop”. backprop neon sign
items.capZh: (c) 一个写着“backprop”的霓虹灯标志。一个写着“backprop”的霓虹灯标志。backprop霓虹灯标志

items.capEn: (d) the exact same cat on the top as a sketch on the bottom
items.capZh: (d) 顶部完全相同的猫作为底部的素描

items.en: By comparison, text-to-image generation has typically been evaluated on relatively small datasets such as MS-COCO and CUB-200 (Welinder et al., 2010). Could dataset size and model size be the limiting factor of current approaches? In this work, we demonstrate that training a 12-billion parameter autoregressive transformer on 250 million image-text pairs collected from the internet results in a flexible, high fidelity generative model of images controllable through natural language.
items.zh: 相比之下，文本到图像生成通常在相对较小的数据集上进行评估，例如MS-COCO和CUB-200（Welinder等人，2010）。数据集大小和模型大小是否是当前方法的限制因素？在这项工作中，我们证明，在从互联网收集的2.5亿图像-文本对上训练一个120亿参数的自回归Transformer，会产生一个灵活、高保真度的图像生成模型，可通过自然语言控制。

items.en: The resulting system achieves high quality image generation on the popular MS-COCO dataset zero-shot, without using any of the training labels. It is preferred over prior work trained on the dataset by human evaluators 90% of the time. We also find that it is able to perform complex tasks such as image-to-image translation at a rudimentary level. This previously required custom approaches (Isola et al., 2017), rather emerging as a capability of a single, large generative model.
items.zh: 由此产生的系统在流行的MS-COCO数据集上以零样本方式实现了高质量图像生成，无需使用任何训练标签。人类评估者90%的情况下更喜欢它而不是在数据集上训练的先前工作。我们还发现，它能够执行复杂的任务，例如在基本水平上进行图像到图像的翻译。这以前需要定制方法（Isola等人，2017），而不是作为单个大型生成模型的能力出现。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Comparison of samples from our model to those from prior approaches on captions from MS-COCO. Each of our model samples is the best of 512 as ranked by the contrastive model. We do not use any manual cherrypicking with the selection of either the captions or the samples from any of the models.
items.capZh: 图3：我们的模型样本与先前方法在MS-COCO标题上的样本比较。我们的每个模型样本都是根据对比模型排名的512个中的最佳样本。我们在选择任何模型的标题或样本时没有使用任何手动挑选。

items.en: Our goal is to train a transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) to autoregressively model the text and image tokens as a single stream of data. However, using pixels directly as image tokens would require an inordinate amount of memory for high-resolution images. Likelihood objectives tend to prioritize modeling short-range dependencies between pixels (Salimans et al., 2017), so much of the modeling capacity would be spent capturing high-frequency details instead of the low-frequency structure that makes objects visually recognizable to us.
items.zh: 我们的目标是训练一个Transformer（Vaswani等人，2017）来将文本和图像令牌自回归地建模为单一数据流。然而，直接使用像素作为图像令牌需要大量的内存来处理高分辨率图像。似然目标倾向于优先考虑像素之间的短程依赖关系建模（Salimans等人，2017），因此大部分建模能力将用于捕获高频细节，而不是使对象在视觉上可识别的低频结构。

items.en: We address these issues by using a two-stage training procedure, similar to (Oord et al., 2017; Razavi et al., 2019):
items.zh: 我们通过使用两阶段训练过程来解决这些问题，类似于（Oord等人，2017；Razavi等人，2019）：

items.en: Stage 1. We train a discrete variational autoencoder (dVAE)111https://github.com/openai/DALL-E to compress each 256×256256256256\times 256 RGB image into a 32×32323232\times 32 grid of image tokens, each element of which can assume 819281928192 possible values. This reduces the context size of the transformer by a factor of 192192192 without a large degradation in visual quality (see Figure 1).
items.zh: 阶段1。我们训练一个离散变分自编码器（dVAE）111https://github.com/openai/DALL-E 将每个256×256 RGB图像压缩成32×32的图像令牌网格，每个元素可以取8192个可能值。这将Transformer的上下文大小减少了192倍，而视觉质量没有大幅下降（见图1）。

items.en: Stage 2. We concatenate up to 256 BPE-encoded text tokens with the 32×32=10243232102432\times 32=1024 image tokens, and train an autoregressive transformer to model the joint distribution over the text and image tokens.
items.zh: 阶段2。我们将最多256个BPE编码的文本令牌与32×32=1024个图像令牌连接起来，并训练一个自回归Transformer来建模文本和图像令牌的联合分布。

items.en: The overall procedure can be viewed as maximizing the evidence lower bound (ELB) (Kingma & Welling, 2013; Rezende et al., 2014) on the joint likelihood of the model distribution over images x𝑥x, captions y𝑦y, and the tokens z𝑧z for the encoded RGB image. We model this distribution using the factorization pθ,ψ​(x,y,z)=pθ​(x|y,z)​pψ​(y,z)subscript𝑝𝜃𝜓𝑥𝑦𝑧subscript𝑝𝜃conditional𝑥𝑦𝑧subscript𝑝𝜓𝑦𝑧p_{\theta,\psi}(x,y,z)=p_{\theta}(x\,|\,y,z)p_{\psi}(y,z), which yields the lower bound
items.zh: 整个过程可以看作最大化图像x、标题y和编码RGB图像的令牌z的模型分布联合似然的证据下界（ELB）（Kingma & Welling, 2013；Rezende等人，2014）。我们使用分解pθ,ψ(x,y,z)=pθ(x|y,z)pψ(y,z)来建模这个分布，这产生了下界

items.en: qϕsubscript𝑞italic-ϕq_{\phi} denotes the distribution over the 32×32323232\times 32 image tokens generated by the dVAE encoder given the RGB image x𝑥x222We assume that y𝑦y is conditionally independent of x𝑥x given z𝑧z.;
items.zh: qϕ表示由dVAE编码器在给定RGB图像x的情况下生成的32×32图像令牌的分布222我们假设y在给定z的条件下独立于x；

items.en: pθsubscript𝑝𝜃p_{\theta} denotes the distribution over the RGB images generated by the dVAE decoder given the image tokens; and
items.zh: pθ表示由dVAE解码器在给定图像令牌的情况下生成的RGB图像的分布；

items.en: pψsubscript𝑝𝜓p_{\psi} denotes the joint distribution over the text and image tokens modeled by the transformer.
items.zh: pψ 表示 Transformer 建模的文本和图像令牌的联合分布。

items.en: Note that the bound only holds for β=1𝛽1\beta=1, while in practice we find it helpful to use larger values (Higgins et al., 2016). The following subsections describe both stages in further detail.333In preliminary experiments on ImageNet (Deng et al., 2009), we attempted to maximize the ELB with respect to ϕitalic-ϕ\phi, θ𝜃\theta, and ψ𝜓\psi jointly, but were unable to improve on two-stage training.
items.zh: 注意，该界限仅对 β=1 成立，而实践中我们发现使用更大的值是有帮助的（Higgins 等人，2016）。以下小节将更详细地描述这两个阶段。333在 ImageNet（Deng 等人，2009）的初步实验中，我们尝试联合最大化关于 φ、θ 和 ψ 的 ELB，但未能改进两阶段训练。

full.sec: 2.1 Stage One: Learning the Visual Codebook
full.secZh: 2.1 第一阶段：学习视觉码本

items.en: In the first stage of training, we maximize the ELB with respect to ϕitalic-ϕ\phi and θ𝜃\theta, which corresponds to training a dVAE on the images alone. We set the initial prior pψsubscript𝑝𝜓p_{\psi} to the uniform categorical distribution over the K=8192𝐾8192K=$8192$ codebook vectors, and qϕsubscript𝑞italic-ϕq_{\phi} to be categorical distributions parameterized by the 819281928192 logits at the same spatial position in the 32×32323232\times 32 grid output by the encoder.
items.zh: 在训练的第一阶段，我们最大化关于 φ 和 θ 的 ELB，这相当于在图像上单独训练 dVAE。我们将初始先验 pψ 设置为 K=8192 个码本向量上的均匀分类分布，并将 qφ 设置为由编码器输出的 32×32 网格中相同空间位置的 8192 个 logits 参数化的分类分布。

items.en: The ELB now becomes difficult to optimize: as qψsubscript𝑞𝜓q_{\psi} is a discrete distribution, and we cannot use the reparameterization gradient to maximize it. Oord et al. (2017); Razavi et al. (2019) address this using an online cluster assignment procedure coupled with the straight-through estimator (Bengio et al., 2013). We instead use the gumbel-softmax relaxation (Jang et al., 2016; Maddison et al., 2016), replacing the expectation over qϕsubscript𝑞italic-ϕq_{\phi} with one over qϕτsubscriptsuperscript𝑞𝜏italic-ϕq^{\tau}_{\phi}, where the relaxation becomes tight as the temperature τ→0→𝜏0\tau\to 0. The likelihood for pθsubscript𝑝𝜃p_{\theta} is evaluated using the log-laplace distribution (see Appendix A.3 for a derivation).
items.zh: ELB 现在变得难以优化：由于 qψ 是离散分布，我们无法使用重参数化梯度来最大化它。Oord 等人（2017）；Razavi 等人（2019）通过使用在线聚类分配过程结合直通估计器（Bengio 等人，2013）来解决这个问题。我们则使用 Gumbel-Softmax 松弛（Jang 等人，2016；Maddison 等人，2016），将对 qφ 的期望替换为对 qφ^τ 的期望，其中松弛在温度 τ→0 时变得紧密。pθ 的似然使用 log-Laplace 分布进行评估（推导见附录 A.3）。

items.en: The relaxed ELB is maximized using Adam (Kingma & Ba, 2014) with exponentially weighted iterate averaging. Appendix A.2 gives a complete description of the hyperparameters, but we found the following to be especially important for stable training:
items.zh: 松弛的 ELB 使用 Adam（Kingma & Ba，2014）和指数加权迭代平均进行最大化。附录 A.2 给出了超参数的完整描述，但我们发现以下内容对稳定训练尤为重要：

items.en: Specific annealing schedules for the relaxation temperature and step size. We found that annealing τ𝜏\tau to 1/161161/16 was sufficient to close the gap between the relaxed validation ELB and the true validation ELB with qϕsubscript𝑞italic-ϕq_{\phi} intsead of qϕτsuperscriptsubscript𝑞italic-ϕ𝜏q_{\phi}^{\tau}.
items.zh: 松弛温度和步长的特定退火计划。我们发现将 τ 退火到 1/16 足以缩小松弛验证 ELB 与使用 qφ 而非 qφ^τ 的真实验证 ELB 之间的差距。

items.en: The use of 1×1111\times 1 convolutions at the end of the encoder and the beginning of the decoder. We found that reducing the receptive field size for the convolutions around the relaxation led to it generalizing better to the true ELB.
items.zh: 在编码器末尾和解码器开头使用 1×1 卷积。我们发现减小松弛周围卷积的感受野有助于其更好地泛化到真实 ELB。

items.en: Multiplication of the outgoing activations from the encoder and decoder resblocks by a small constant, to ensure stable training at initialization.
items.zh: 将编码器和解码器残差块的输出激活乘以一个小常数，以确保初始化时的稳定训练。

items.en: We also found that increasing the KL weight to β=6.6𝛽6.6\beta=6.6 promotes better codebook usage and ultimately leads to a smaller reconstruction error at the end of training.444This is contrary to the usual tradeoff between the two terms. We speculate that for smaller values of β𝛽\beta, the noise from the relaxation causes the optimizer to reduce codebook usage toward the beginning of training, resulting in worse ELB at convergence.
items.zh: 我们还发现将 KL 权重增加到 β=6.6 可以促进更好的码本使用，并最终在训练结束时产生更小的重构误差。444这与两项之间的通常权衡相反。我们推测，对于较小的 β 值，松弛带来的噪声会导致优化器在训练初期减少码本使用，从而导致收敛时 ELB 更差。

items.en: In the second stage, we fix ϕitalic-ϕ\phi and θ𝜃\theta, and learn the prior distribution over the text and image tokens by maximizing the ELB with respect to ψ𝜓\psi. Here, pψsubscript𝑝𝜓p_{\psi} is represented by a 12-billion parameter sparse transformer (Child et al., 2019).
items.zh: 在第二阶段，我们固定 φ 和 θ，并通过最大化关于 ψ 的 ELB 来学习文本和图像令牌上的先验分布。这里，pψ 由一个 120 亿参数的稀疏 Transformer（Child 等人，2019）表示。

items.en: Given a text-image pair, we BPE-encode (Sennrich et al., 2015) the lowercased caption using at most 256 tokens555During training, we apply 10% BPE dropout (Provilkov et al., 2019), whose use is common in the neural machine translation literature. with vocabulary size 163841638416384, and encode the image using 32×32=10243232102432\times 32=1024 tokens with vocabulary size 819281928192. The image tokens are obtained using argmax sampling from the dVAE encoder logits, without adding any gumbel noise.666Strictly speaking, Equation 1 requires us to sample from the categorical distribution specified by the dVAE encoder logits, rather than taking the argmax. In preliminary experiments on ImageNet, we found that this was a useful regularizer in the overparameterized regime, and allows the transformer to be trained using soft targets for the cross-entropy loss. We decided against this here since the model in consideration is in the underparameterized regime. Finally, the text and image tokens are concatenated and modeled autoregressively as a single stream of data.
items.zh: 给定一个文本-图像对，我们使用 BPE 编码（Sennrich 等人，2015）将小写标题编码为最多 256 个令牌555训练期间，我们应用 10% 的 BPE 丢弃（Provilkov 等人，2019），这在神经机器翻译文献中很常见。，词汇表大小为 16384，并使用 32×32=1024 个令牌对图像进行编码，词汇表大小为 8192。图像令牌通过从 dVAE 编码器 logits 中取 argmax 获得，不添加任何 Gumbel 噪声。666严格来说，公式 1 要求我们从 dVAE 编码器 logits 指定的分类分布中采样，而不是取 argmax。在 ImageNet 的初步实验中，我们发现这在过参数化区域是一个有用的正则化器，并允许 Transformer 使用交叉熵损失的软目标进行训练。我们在此决定不这样做，因为所考虑的模型处于欠参数化区域。最后，文本和图像令牌被连接起来，并作为单个数据流进行自回归建模。

items.en: The transformer is a decoder-only model in which each image token can attend to all text tokens in any one of its 64 self-attention layers. The full architecture is described in Appendix B.1. There are three different kinds of self-attention masks used in the model. The part of the attention masks corresponding to the text-to-text attention is the standard causal mask, and the part for the image-to-image attention uses either a row, column, or convolutional attention mask.777We found using a single attention operation for all three interactions – “text attends to text”, “image attends to text”, and “image attends to image” – to perform better than using separate attention operations that are independently normalized.
items.zh: Transformer 是一个仅解码器模型，其中每个图像令牌可以在其 64 个自注意力层中的任意一层关注所有文本令牌。完整架构在附录 B.1 中描述。模型中使用了三种不同类型的自注意力掩码。注意力掩码中对应于文本到文本注意力的部分是标准因果掩码，而图像到图像注意力的部分使用行、列或卷积注意力掩码。777我们发现，对所有三种交互——“文本关注文本”、“图像关注文本”和“图像关注图像”——使用单个注意力操作比使用独立归一化的单独注意力操作效果更好。

items.en: We limit the length of a text caption to 256 tokens, though it is not totally clear what to do for the “padding” positions in between the last text token and the start-of-image token. One option is to set the logits for these tokens to −∞-\infty in the self-attention operations. Instead, we opt to learn a special padding token separately for each of the 256 text positions. This token is used only when no text token is available. In preliminary experiments on Conceptual Captions (Sharma et al., 2018), we found that this resulted in higher validation loss, but better performance on out-of-distribution captions.
items.zh: 我们将文本标题的长度限制为 256 个令牌，但对于最后一个文本令牌和图像起始令牌之间的“填充”位置如何处理并不完全清楚。一种选择是在自注意力操作中将这些令牌的 logits 设置为 -∞。相反，我们选择为 256 个文本位置中的每一个单独学习一个特殊的填充令牌。该令牌仅在无文本令牌可用时使用。在 Conceptual Captions（Sharma 等人，2018）的初步实验中，我们发现这导致了更高的验证损失，但在分布外标题上表现更好。

items.en: We normalize the cross-entropy losses for the text and image tokens by the total number of each kind in a batch of data. Since we are primarily interested in image modeling, we multiply the cross-entropy loss for the text by 1/8181/8 and the cross-entropy loss for the image by 7/8787/8. The objective is optimized using Adam with exponentially weighted iterate averaging; Appendix B.2 describes the training procedure in more detail. We reserved about 606000606000606000 images for validation, and found no signs of overfitting at convergence.
items.zh: 我们通过一批数据中每种令牌的总数来归一化文本和图像令牌的交叉熵损失。由于我们主要关注图像建模，我们将文本的交叉熵损失乘以 1/8，图像的交叉熵损失乘以 7/8。目标使用 Adam 和指数加权迭代平均进行优化；附录 B.2 更详细地描述了训练过程。我们保留了大约 606000 张图像用于验证，并在收敛时未发现过拟合迹象。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Illustration of per-resblock gradient scaling for a transformer resblock. The solid line indicates the sequence of operations for forward propagation, and the dashed line the sequence of operations for backpropagation. We scale the incoming gradient for each resblock by its gradient scale, and unscale the outgoing gradient before it is added to the sum of the gradients from the successive resblocks. The activations and gradients along the identity path are stored in 32-bit precision. The “filter” operation sets all Inf and NaN values in the activation gradient to zero. Without this, a nonfinite event in the current resblock would cause the gradient scales for all preceding resblocks to unnecessarily drop, thereby resulting in underflow.
items.capZh: 图 4：Transformer 残差块的每残差块梯度缩放示意图。实线表示前向传播的操作序列，虚线表示反向传播的操作序列。我们将每个残差块的传入梯度乘以其梯度缩放因子，并在将其添加到后续残差块的梯度之和之前，对传出梯度进行反缩放。恒等路径上的激活和梯度以 32 位精度存储。“过滤”操作将激活梯度中的所有 Inf 和 NaN 值设置为零。如果没有这个操作，当前残差块中的非有限事件将导致所有先前残差块的梯度缩放因子不必要地下降，从而导致下溢。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Communication patterns used for distributed training. Each parameter array in the model is sharded among the eight GPUs on each machine. During forward propagation, we prefetch the parameter shards for the next resblock (using all-gather) while computing the activations for the current resblock. To conserve memory, the parameter shards from the other GPUs are immediately discarded. Similarly, during backpropagation, we prefetch the parameter shards for the previous resblock while computing the activations and gradients for the current resblock. After all GPUs have computed the gradient with respect to an all-gathered parameter, the reduce-scatter operation leaves each GPU with only one slice – i.e., the gradient for its parameter shard, averaged over the eight GPUs.
items.capZh: 图 5：用于分布式训练的通信模式。模型中的每个参数数组在每台机器的八个 GPU 之间分片。在前向传播期间，我们在计算当前残差块的激活时预取下一个残差块的参数分片（使用 all-gather）。为了节省内存，来自其他 GPU 的参数分片会立即丢弃。类似地，在反向传播期间，我们在计算当前残差块的激活和梯度时预取前一个残差块的参数分片。在所有 GPU 计算了相对于某个 all-gathered 参数的梯度后，reduce-scatter 操作使每个 GPU 只保留一个切片——即其参数分片的梯度，在八个 GPU 上平均。

items.en: Our preliminary experiments for models up to 1.21.21.2 billion parameters were carried out on Conceptual Captions, a dataset of 3.3 million text-image pairs that was developed as an extension to MS-COCO (Lin et al., 2014).
items.zh: 我们对高达 12 亿参数的模型的初步实验是在 Conceptual Captions 上进行的，这是一个包含 330 万文本-图像对的数据集，作为 MS-COCO（Lin 等人，2014）的扩展而开发。

items.en: To scale up to 121212-billion parameters, we created a dataset of a similar scale to JFT-300M (Sun et al., 2017) by collecting 250 million text-images pairs from the internet. This dataset does not include MS-COCO, but does include Conceptual Captions and a filtered subset of YFCC100M (Thomee et al., 2016). As MS-COCO was created from the latter, our training data includes a fraction of the MS-COCO validation images (but none of the captions). We control for this in the quantitative results presented in Section 3 and find that it has no appreciable bearing on the results. We provide further details about the data collection process in Appendix C.
items.zh: 为了扩展到 120 亿参数，我们创建了一个与 JFT-300M（Sun 等人，2017）规模相似的数据集，从互联网收集了 2.5 亿个文本-图像对。该数据集不包括 MS-COCO，但包括 Conceptual Captions 和 YFCC100M（Thomee 等人，2016）的过滤子集。由于 MS-COCO 是从后者创建的，我们的训练数据包含一部分 MS-COCO 验证图像（但不包含任何标题）。我们在第 3 节呈现的定量结果中对此进行了控制，并发现它对结果没有明显影响。我们在附录 C 中提供了关于数据收集过程的更多细节。

items.en: To save GPU memory and increase throughput, most parameters, Adam moments, and activations are stored in 16-bit precision. We also use activation checkpointing and recompute the activations within the resblocks during the backward pass. Getting the model to train in 16-bit precision past one billion parameters, without diverging, was the most challenging part of this project.
items.zh: 为了节省 GPU 内存并提高吞吐量，大多数参数、Adam 矩和激活都以 16 位精度存储。我们还使用激活检查点，并在反向传播期间重新计算残差块内的激活。让模型在超过 10 亿参数的情况下以 16 位精度训练而不发散，是这个项目中最具挑战性的部分。

items.en: We believe the root cause of this instability to be underflow in the 16-bit gradients. Appendix D presents a set of guidelines we developed to avoid underflow when training large-scale generative models. Here, we describe one of these guidelines: per-resblock gradient scaling.
items.zh: 我们认为这种不稳定的根本原因是 16 位梯度中的下溢。附录 D 提供了一套我们在训练大规模生成模型时为避免下溢而制定的指南。这里，我们描述其中一个指南：每残差块梯度缩放。

items.en: Similar to prior work (Liu et al., 2020), we found that the norms of the activation gradients from the resblocks decrease monotonically as we move from the earlier resblocks to the later ones.888It is possible that better initialization schemes (Liu et al., 2020) might be able to avoid this, but we did not have success with alternative schemes in our experiments. As the model is made deeper and wider, the true exponents of the activation gradients for later resblocks can fall below the minimum exponent of the 16-bit format. Consequently, they get rounded to zero, a phenomenon called underflow. We found that eliminating underflow allowed for stable training to convergence.
items.zh: 与先前的工作（Liu 等人，2020）类似，我们发现残差块的激活梯度范数从早期残差块到后期残差块单调递减。888 可能更好的初始化方案（Liu 等人，2020）能够避免这种情况，但在我们的实验中，替代方案并未成功。随着模型变得更深更宽，后期残差块的激活梯度的真实指数可能低于 16 位格式的最小指数，因此它们会被舍入为零，这种现象称为下溢。我们发现消除下溢可以实现稳定的训练直至收敛。

items.en: Standard loss scaling (Micikevicius et al., 2017) is able to avoid underflow when the range spanned by the smallest and largest activation gradients (in absolute value) fits within the exponent range of the 16-bit format. On NVIDIA V100 GPUs, this exponent range is specified by five bits. While this is sufficient for training vanilla language models of the same size, we found the range to be too small for the text-to-image model.
items.zh: 标准损失缩放（Micikevicius 等人，2017）能够在最小和最大激活梯度（绝对值）所跨越的范围适合 16 位格式的指数范围时避免下溢。在 NVIDIA V100 GPU 上，该指数范围由 5 位指定。虽然这对于训练相同规模的普通语言模型是足够的，但我们发现该范围对于文本到图像模型来说太小了。

items.en: Our fix, which is shown in Figure 4, involves using a separate “gradient scale” for each resblock in the model. This can be seen as a practical alternative to a more general framework for mixed-precision training called Flexpoint (Köster et al., 2017), with the advantage that specialized GPU kernels are not required. We found that Sun et al. (2020) had independently developed similar procedure for training convolutional networks in 4-bit precision.
items.zh: 我们的修复方法如图 4 所示，涉及为模型中的每个残差块使用单独的“梯度缩放”。这可以看作是更通用的混合精度训练框架 Flexpoint（Köster 等人，2017）的实用替代方案，其优势在于不需要专门的 GPU 内核。我们发现 Sun 等人（2020）独立开发了类似的过程，用于以 4 位精度训练卷积网络。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Effect of increasing the number of images for the contrastive reranking procedure on MS-COCO captions.
items.capZh: 图 6：在 MS-COCO 标题上增加对比度重排序过程的图像数量的效果。

items.en: Our 12-billion parameter model consumes about 24 GB of memory when stored in 16-bit precision, which exceeds the memory of a 16 GB NVIDIA V100 GPU. We address this using parameter sharding (Rajbhandari et al., 2019). As shown in Figure 5, parameter sharding allows us to almost completely hide the latency of the intra-machine communication by overlapping it with compute-intensive operations.
items.zh: 我们的 120 亿参数模型以 16 位精度存储时消耗约 24 GB 内存，超过了 16 GB NVIDIA V100 GPU 的内存。我们通过参数分片（Rajbhandari 等人，2019）解决了这个问题。如图 5 所示，参数分片允许我们通过将其与计算密集型操作重叠来几乎完全隐藏机器内通信的延迟。

items.en: On the cluster used to train the model, the bandwidth between machines is much lower than the bandwidth among GPUs on the same machine. This makes the cost of the operation used to average the gradient among the machines (all-reduce) the main bottleneck during training. We were able to drastically reduce this cost by compressing the gradients using PowerSGD (Vogels et al., 2019).
items.zh: 在用于训练模型的集群上，机器之间的带宽远低于同一机器上 GPU 之间的带宽。这使得用于在机器之间平均梯度的操作（全规约）成为训练期间的主要瓶颈。我们通过使用 PowerSGD（Vogels 等人，2019）压缩梯度来大幅降低这一成本。

items.en: In our implementation, each GPU in a machine computes the low-rank factors for its parameter shard gradients independently of its neighboring GPUs.999There is still intra-machine communication for other operations; what we mean is that the low-rank factors across the shards, when concatenated, are not regarded as collectively approximating the gradient for the full parameter matrix. Once the low-rank factors are computed, each machine sets its error buffer to the residual between the uncompressed gradient averaged over its eight GPUs (obtained from reduce-scatter), and the decompressed gradient obtained from the low-rank factors.
items.zh: 在我们的实现中，一台机器上的每个 GPU 独立于其相邻 GPU 计算其参数分片梯度的低秩因子。999 其他操作仍然存在机器内通信；我们的意思是，当拼接时，各分片的低秩因子不被视为共同近似完整参数矩阵的梯度。一旦计算出低秩因子，每台机器将其误差缓冲区设置为在其八个 GPU 上平均的未压缩梯度（通过 reduce-scatter 获得）与从低秩因子获得的解压缩梯度之间的残差。

items.en: PowerSGD replaces the large communication operation for an uncompressed parameter gradient with two, much smaller communication operations for its low-rank factors. For a given compression rank r𝑟r and transformer activation size dmodelsubscript𝑑modeld_{\mathrm{model}}, the compression rate is given by 1−5​r/(8​dmodel)15𝑟8subscript𝑑model1-5r/(8d_{\textrm{model}}) (see Appendix E.1). Table 1 shows that we can achieve a compression rate of about 85%percent8585\%, independent of model size.
items.zh: PowerSGD 将未压缩参数梯度的大通信操作替换为其低秩因子的两个小得多的通信操作。对于给定的压缩秩 r 和 Transformer 激活维度 d_model，压缩率为 1 - 5r/(8d_model)（参见附录 E.1）。表 1 显示我们可以实现约 85% 的压缩率，与模型大小无关。

items.en: In Appendix E.2, we describe various details that were necessary to get PowerSGD to perform well at scale. These include:
items.zh: 在附录 E.2 中，我们描述了使 PowerSGD 在大规模下良好运行所需的各种细节。这些包括：

items.en: Saving memory by accumulating the gradient into the error buffers during backpropagation, rather than allocating separate buffers.
items.zh: 通过在反向传播期间将梯度累积到误差缓冲区中，而不是分配单独的缓冲区，来节省内存。

items.en: Minimizing instances in which we zero out the error buffers (e.g., due to nonfinite values encountered during mixed-precision backpropagation, or when resuming training from a checkpoint).
items.zh: 最小化将误差缓冲区清零的情况（例如，由于混合精度反向传播期间遇到非有限值，或从检查点恢复训练时）。

items.en: Improving numerical stability by using Householder orthogonalization instead of Gram-Schmidt, together with the addition of a small multiple of the identity matrix to the input.
items.zh: 通过使用 Householder 正交化代替 Gram-Schmidt，并在输入中添加单位矩阵的小倍数，来提高数值稳定性。

items.en: Avoiding underflow by using a custom 16-bit floating point format for the error buffers, their low-rank factors, and the all-reduce communication operations involving them.
items.zh: 通过为误差缓冲区、其低秩因子以及涉及它们的全规约通信操作使用自定义的 16 位浮点格式来避免下溢。

items.en: We also found the warm-start procedure for the Q𝑄Q matrix described in Vogels et al. (2019) to be unnecessary: we were able to get equivalent results by fixing Q𝑄Q to a random gaussian matrix at the start of training, and never updating it.101010We verified that the error in reconstructing the true gradient is higher when Q𝑄Q is fixed as opposed to being updated using warm-starting, so it is interesting that this does not affect the loss. By contrast, resampling Q𝑄Q at every update causes a large performance hit.
items.zh: 我们还发现 Vogels 等人（2019）中描述的 Q 矩阵的热启动过程是不必要的：我们通过在训练开始时将 Q 固定为随机高斯矩阵并且从不更新它，获得了等效的结果。101010 我们验证了当 Q 固定时重建真实梯度的误差高于使用热启动更新时，因此有趣的是这并不影响损失。相比之下，在每次更新时重新采样 Q 会导致较大的性能损失。

items.en: Similar to Razavi et al. (2019), we rerank the samples drawn from the transformer using a pretrained contrastive model (Radford et al., 2021). Given a caption and a candidate image, the contrastive model assigns a score based on how well the image matches the caption. Figure 6 shows the effect of increasing the number of samples N𝑁N from which we select the top k𝑘k images. This process can be seen as a kind of language-guided search (Andreas et al., 2017), and is also similar to the auxiliary text-image matching loss proposed by Xu et al. (2018). Unless otherwise stated, all samples used for both qualitative and quantitative results are obtained without temperature reduction (i.e., using t=1𝑡1t=1) (except for Figure 2) and use reranking with N=512𝑁512N=512.
items.zh: 与 Razavi 等人（2019）类似，我们使用预训练的对比度模型（Radford 等人，2021）对从 Transformer 中抽取的样本进行重排序。给定一个标题和一个候选图像，对比度模型根据图像与标题的匹配程度分配分数。图 6 显示了增加从中选择前 k 个图像的样本数量 N 的效果。这个过程可以看作是一种语言引导的搜索（Andreas 等人，2017），并且类似于 Xu 等人（2018）提出的辅助文本-图像匹配损失。除非另有说明，所有用于定性和定量结果的样本都是在不降低温度的情况下获得的（即使用 t=1）（图 2 除外），并使用 N=512 的重排序。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Human evaluation of our model (evaluated zero-shot without temperature reduction) vs prior work (DF-GAN) on captions from MS-COCO. In a best-of-five vote, our model’s sample was chosen as the most realistic 90.0% of the time, and was chosen as the image best matching a shared caption 93.3% of the time.
items.capZh: 图 7：我们的模型（零样本评估，无温度降低）与先前工作（DF-GAN）在 MS-COCO 标题上的人工评估。在五局三胜制投票中，我们的模型样本在 90.0% 的情况下被选为最逼真的，在 93.3% 的情况下被选为与共享标题最匹配的图像。

items.en: We evaluate our model zero-shot by comparing it to three prior approaches: AttnGAN (Xu et al., 2018), DM-GAN (Zhu et al., 2019), and DF-GAN (Tao et al., 2020), the last of which reports the best Inception Score (Salimans et al., 2016) and Fréchet Inception Distance (Heusel et al., 2017) on MS-COCO. Figure 3 qualitatively compares samples from our model to those from prior work.
items.zh: 我们通过将我们的模型与三种先前方法进行比较来进行零样本评估：AttnGAN（Xu 等人，2018）、DM-GAN（Zhu 等人，2019）和 DF-GAN（Tao 等人，2020），其中最后一种在 MS-COCO 上报告了最佳 Inception Score（Salimans 等人，2016）和 Fréchet Inception Distance（Heusel 等人，2017）。图 3 定性地比较了我们的模型与先前工作的样本。

items.en: We also conduct a human evaluation similar to the one used in Koh et al. (2021) to compare our approach to DF-GAN, the results of which are shown in Figure 7. Given a caption, the sample from our model receives the majority vote for better matching the caption 93% of the time. It also receives the majority vote for being more realistic 90% of the time.
items.zh: 我们还进行了类似于 Koh 等人（2021）中使用的人工评估，将我们的方法与 DF-GAN 进行比较，结果如图 7 所示。给定一个标题，我们的模型样本在 93% 的情况下获得多数票，认为其更好地匹配标题。在 90% 的情况下，它也被多数票认为更逼真。

items.en: Training the transformer on the tokens from the dVAE encoder allows us to allocate its modeling capacity to the low-frequency information that makes images visually recognizable to us. However, it also disadvantages the model, since the heavy compression renders it unable to produce high-frequency details. To test the effect of this on the quantitative evaluations, we compute the FID and IS in Figure 9(a) after applying a Gaussian filter with varying radius to both the validation images and samples from the models. Our approach achieves the best FID by a margin of about 6 points with a slight blur of radius 1. The gap between our approach and others tends to widen as the blur radius is increased. We also obtain the highest IS when the blur radius is greater than or equal to two.
items.zh: 在 dVAE 编码器的标记上训练 Transformer 使我们能够将其建模能力分配给低频信息，这些信息使图像在视觉上可识别。然而，这也使模型处于劣势，因为重度压缩使其无法产生高频细节。为了测试这对定量评估的影响，我们在图 9(a) 中计算了 FID 和 IS，对验证图像和模型样本应用了不同半径的高斯滤波器。我们的方法在半径为 1 的轻微模糊下以约 6 分的优势获得了最佳 FID。随着模糊半径的增加，我们的方法与其他方法之间的差距趋于扩大。当模糊半径大于或等于 2 时，我们还获得了最高的 IS。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Zero-shot samples from our model on the CUB dataset.
items.capZh: 图 8：我们的模型在 CUB 数据集上的零样本样本。

items.capEn: (a) FID and IS on MS-COCO as a function of blur radius.
items.capZh: (a) 在 MS-COCO 上，FID 和 IS 随模糊半径的变化。

items.capEn: (b) FID and IS on CUB as a function of blur radius.
items.capZh: (b) 在 CUB 上，FID 和 IS 随模糊半径的变化。

items.capEn: (c) FID and IS on MS-COCO as a function of the sample size used for reranking.
items.capZh: (c) 在 MS-COCO 上，FID 和 IS 随用于重排的样本量的变化。

items.en: Our model fares significantly worse on the CUB dataset, for which there is a nearly 40-point gap in FID between our model and the leading prior approach (Figure 9(b)). We found an 12%percent1212\% overlap rate for this dataset, and again observed no significant difference in the results after removing these images. We speculate that our zero-shot approach is less likely to compare favorably on specialized distributions such as CUB. We believe that fine-tuning is a promising direction for improvement, and leave this investigation to future work. Samples from our model for captions in this dataset are shown in Figure 8.
items.zh: 我们的模型在 CUB 数据集上表现明显更差，FID 与领先的先前方法相比有近 40 个点的差距（图 9(b)）。我们发现该数据集的重复率为 12%，并且在移除这些图像后结果没有显著差异。我们推测，我们的零样本方法在 CUB 等专门分布上不太可能表现良好。我们认为微调是一个有希望的改进方向，并将此研究留待未来工作。该数据集中我们模型对标题生成的样本如图 8 所示。

items.en: Finally, Figure 9(c) shows clear improvements in FID and IS for MS-COCO as the sample size used for reranking with the contrastive model is increased. This trend continues up to a sample size of 32, after which we observe diminishing returns.
items.zh: 最后，图 9(c) 显示，随着用于对比模型重排的样本量增加，MS-COCO 上的 FID 和 IS 明显改善。这种趋势持续到样本量为 32，之后我们观察到收益递减。

items.en: We used the deduplication procedure described in Radford et al. (2021) to determine which images to remove. For each validation image, we find the closest image in the training data using a contrastive model specifically trained for this task. We then sort the images in descending order by closeness to their nearest matches in the training data. After inspecting the results by hand, we determine the images to remove by manually selecting a conservative threshold designed to minimize the false negative rate.
items.zh: 我们使用了 Radford 等人 (2021) 中描述的去重程序来确定要移除的图像。对于每个验证图像，我们使用专门为此任务训练的对比模型在训练数据中找到最接近的图像。然后，我们按与训练数据中最近匹配的接近度降序排列图像。在手动检查结果后，我们通过手动选择保守阈值来确定要移除的图像，以最小化假阴性率。

items.en: We found that our model has the ability to generalize in ways that we did not originally anticipate. When given the caption “a tapir made of accordion…” (Figure 2a), the model appears to draw a tapir with an accordion for a body, or an accordion whose keyboard or bass are in the shape of a tapir’s trunk or legs. This suggests that it has developed a rudimentary ability to compose unusual concepts at high levels of abstraction.
items.zh: 我们发现我们的模型能够以我们最初未预料到的方式进行泛化。当给定标题“由手风琴制成的貘”（图 2a）时，模型似乎画出了一只身体是手风琴的貘，或者一个键盘或低音部分呈貘鼻或腿形状的手风琴。这表明它已经发展出在高抽象层次组合不寻常概念的基本能力。

items.en: Our model also appears to be capable of combinatorial generalization, such as when rendering text (Figure 2b) or when probed on sentences like “an illustration of a baby hedgehog in a christmas sweater walking a dog” (Figure 2c). Prompts like the latter require the model to perform variable binding (Smolensky, 1990; Greff et al., 2020) – it is the hedgehog that is in the christmas sweater, not the dog. We note, however, that the model performs inconsistently on the task, sometimes drawing both animals with christmas sweaters, or drawing a hedgehog walking a smaller hedgehog.
items.zh: 我们的模型似乎也能够进行组合泛化，例如在渲染文本（图 2b）或测试诸如“一只穿着圣诞毛衣的刺猬宝宝遛狗的插图”（图 2c）等句子时。像后者这样的提示要求模型执行变量绑定（Smolensky, 1990; Greff et al., 2020）——是刺猬穿着圣诞毛衣，而不是狗。然而，我们注意到模型在此任务上表现不一致，有时会画出两只动物都穿着圣诞毛衣，或者画出一只刺猬遛着一只更小的刺猬。

items.en: To a limited degree of reliability, we also find our model to be capable of zero-shot image-to-image translation controllable by natural language (Figure 2d). When the model is given the caption “the exact same cat on the top as a sketch at the bottom” and the top 15×32153215\times 32 part of the image token grid for a photo of a cat, it is able to draw a sketch of a similar looking cat on the bottom.
items.zh: 在有限的可靠性下，我们还发现我们的模型能够进行由自然语言控制的零样本图像到图像的翻译（图 2d）。当模型被给予标题“顶部完全相同的猫，底部是素描”以及一张猫照片的图像标记网格的顶部 15×32 部分时，它能够在底部画出一只相似猫的素描。

items.en: This works with several other kinds of transformations, including image operations (e.g., changing the color of the image, converting it to grayscale, or flipping it upside-down) and style transfer (e.g., drawing the cat on a greeting card, a postage stamp, or a cell phone case). Some transformations, such as those that involve only changing the color of the animal, suggest that the model is capable of performing a rudimentary kind of object segmentation. We provide additional examples of zero-shot image-to-image translation in Section G.
items.zh: 这适用于其他几种变换，包括图像操作（例如，改变图像颜色、转换为灰度或上下翻转）和风格迁移（例如，在贺卡、邮票或手机壳上画猫）。一些变换，例如仅涉及改变动物颜色的变换，表明模型能够执行基本的对象分割。我们在第 G 节中提供了零样本图像到图像翻译的额外示例。

items.en: We investigate a simple approach for text-to-image generation based on an autoregressive transformer, when it is executed at scale. We find that scale can lead to improved generalization, both in terms of zero-shot performance relative to previous domain-specific approaches, and in terms of the range of capabilities that emerge from a single generative model. Our findings suggest that improving generalization as a function of scale may be a useful driver for progress on this task.
items.zh: 我们研究了一种基于自回归 Transformer 的文本到图像生成的简单方法，并在大规模执行时进行了探索。我们发现规模可以带来更好的泛化，无论是在零样本性能相对于先前特定领域方法方面，还是在单个生成模型涌现出的能力范围方面。我们的发现表明，作为规模函数的泛化改进可能是该任务进展的有用驱动力。

items.en: We would like to thank Matthew Knight for reviewing the code release for this work, and Rewon Child, John Schulman, Heewoo Jun, and Prafulla Dhariwal for helpful early feedback on the paper. We would also like to thank Jong Wook Kim for writing the PyTorch package for the contrastive model described in Radford et al. (2019) that we used to rerank the samples from our model.
items.zh: 我们要感谢 Matthew Knight 审阅本工作的代码发布，以及 Rewon Child、John Schulman、Heewoo Jun 和 Prafulla Dhariwal 对论文早期版本的有益反馈。我们还要感谢 Jong Wook Kim 编写了 Radford 等人 (2019) 中描述的对比模型的 PyTorch 包，我们使用该模型对我们的模型样本进行重排。
